methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.__init__
documentation:
Prepare the file locker. Specify the file to lock and optionally
the maximum timeoutSeconds and the retrySeconds between each attempt to lock.

It is assumed that the locking file will be created within the
path of the target file.

methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.acquire
documentation:
Create the lock if no lock file exists.  If a lockfile exists then
repeat the test every retrySeconds.

If the lock cannot be acquired within  'timeoutSeconds' then
throw an exception.

methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.release
documentation: Remove an existing lock file.

methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.__enter__
documentation: Internal method for Context-management support.  Invoked at the beginning of a 'with' clause.

methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.__exit__
documentation: Internal method for Context-management support.  Invoked at the end of a 'with' clause.

methods.name: mmcif_utils.persist.LockFile.LockFile.__del__
documentation: Internal method to cleanup any lingering lock file.

A simple cross-platform file locking utilitiy class using an auxiliary
lock file.

This class provides internal methods supporting context-management
(e.g. with statement support).  For example,

with LockFile("target-file.db", timeoutSeconds=2) as lock:
    # - process/update the target-file.db.

# - At the end of this 'with' clause the lock is automatically removed.

documentation:
Translate content of inpFilePath to outFilePath subject to current mapping information.
Categories with no mapping details are transfered without attenuation.

 mode = sense of mapping relative to mapping info declarations
